name: Jampore Beach
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
description: A tranquil, wide beach lined with casuarina trees offering dark sands, gentle waves, and activities like camel rides and parasailing — perfect for a relaxing sunset.
history: One of Daman's primary beaches, it has long been a favored weekend getaway for residents of neighboring Gujarat and Maharashtra.
famousFor: Black sand, casuarina trees, water sports
